title: draba × ursorum
intro: Draba × ursorum, also known as Arctic draba or Siberian draba, is a rare alpine plant species that is a hybrid of Draba sibirica and Draba arctica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba × ursorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications and optimal preparation methods.
